human_readable_label: High late-delivery risk and high predicted margin; these orders combine service risk with meaningful expected value.
operational_priority: Prioritize pre-dispatch protection and exception handling before lower-risk work.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to predicted risk and predicted margin evidence; they do not establish realized delivery or profit improvement from intervention.

human_readable_label: High late-delivery risk and low predicted margin; these orders have service risk but limited expected economic upside.
operational_priority: Review selectively before committing scarce expedited capacity.
limitation_caution: Small segment size means recommendations should be applied case by case and not generalized as a broad operating policy.

human_readable_label: Low late-delivery risk and high predicted margin; these orders have expected value but do not require urgent risk intervention.
operational_priority: Maintain standard service quality and protect customer experience without unnecessary escalation.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited by predicted risk evidence; low predicted risk does not remove the need for normal monitoring and only argues against urgent intervention by default.

human_readable_label: Low late-delivery risk and low predicted margin; these orders do not show strong risk or margin reasons for special handling.
operational_priority: Use normal operating procedures and avoid special-cost interventions unless new information appears.
limitation_caution: Small segment size limits broad conclusions; recommendations should remain conservative.

human_readable_label: Missing AO1 or AO2 score inputs; the order cannot be assigned to a reliable operational segment.
operational_priority: Hold automated AO3 prioritization and review score pipeline completeness before actioning from the matrix.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to data-quality review; if this segment appears in future refreshes it indicates a data or scoring issue, not a direct business recommendation.

human_readable_label: Missing or invalid AO3 order value or predicted margin; the order cannot be placed reliably on the margin axis.
operational_priority: Hold automated margin-based prioritization and review denominator or margin construction before actioning.
limitation_caution: Recommendations are limited to data-quality review; if this segment appears in future refreshes it indicates a data-quality issue and should require manual review before business action.
